# Welcome {.unnumbered}

This is the open textbook for Business Information Systems, replacing the commercial McGraw Hill materials with freely available, course-authored content.

Each chapter is written to be worked through alongside a companion Excel workbook, downloadable from that chapter's page. Look for the yellow/blue/white cell legend explained in each starter file.

## How this book is organized

The book follows the same module structure as the course itself: spreadsheet fundamentals first, then databases, then security/cloud/AI. Chapter 1 is the first complete draft; more chapters will be added here as they're written.
